'''Abraxas''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Abraxas system/Legends|Abraxas system]] situated within the [[Yushan sector/Legends|Yushan sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] Territories. Abraxas was run dry of its rich natural resources by overwhelming [[Mining/Legends|mining]], and became a base for the [[Eiattu pirates]]. Soon after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] discovered and [[Operation on Abraxas|threw]] the pirates out.

==History==
Abraxas was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Abraxas system/Legends|Abraxas system]] within the [[Yushan sector/Legends|Yushan sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEA" /> Located in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] region, the world was habitable and its [[Atmosphere/Legends#Type I atmospheres|atmosphere breathable]], it was also known for its rich mineral and [[Ore/Legends|ore]] deposits.<ref name="SWE" /> Over time, its transport ships and orbital refineries were abandoned when its [[Mining/Legends|mines]] ran dry, and the debris eventually spread over the entire system, making travel through the area almost impossible. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], during the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] era, Abraxas was used as a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate's]] band base, a group known as [[Eiattu pirates|TIE pirates]] for their use of Imperial [[TIE series/Legends|TIE starfighters]]. The base was then discovered and [[Operation on Abraxas|destroyed]] by New Republic forces under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Firmus Nantz]].<ref name="TEGW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Abraxas was first mentioned in the [[2000]] "[[Lando's Commandos: On Eagles' Wings]]" comics within [[Star Wars Tales 5|''Star Wars Tales'' 5]].
